title: Spicy Tender Festive Australian Pine Nuts Stir-fry
description: This dish features tender pine nuts in a spicy mediterranean-friendly sauce that is perfect for lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper
ingredients.notes: For extra heat, adjust to taste

ingredients.name: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cracked pine nuts and stir for about 1 minute until lightly toasted.
Add red bell pepper slices, onion, and minced garlic. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until vegetables are softened but still crisp.
Stir in lemon juice, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper. Cook for an additional 1 minute to meld flavors.
Remove from heat and stir in chopped fresh dill just before serving.
Serve hot with crusty bread on the side.
